eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following areas: St. Mary, LA; at 05:23 PM ON FEB 21, 2026 Effective until 06:23 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: CITY OF FRANKLIN WASTER CUSTOMERS ARE UNDER A BOIL WATER ADVISORY. DO NOT USE FRANKLIN WATER SYTEM WATER UNLESS YOU BOIL WATER TO A FULL BOIL. THIS INCLUDES FOUNTAIN DRINKS MAKING ICE ETC.
